extensionName.message: tweet2md: Export X (Twitter) Threads, Tweets & Articles to Markdown

extensionDescription.message: One-click export of X (Twitter) threads, tweets, and articles to clean Markdown with images and metadata. Perfect for Obsidian, Notion, and AI/RAG workflows. Works locally—no API, no tracking.

opt_save_images_title.message: Download images to a folder next to the Markdown file

opt_metadata_title.message: Add likes, reposts, views as YAML frontmatter

footer_hint.message: Navigate to a tweet or article on X.com first

error_reload.message: Reload the page and try again.

error_specific_page.message: Open a specific tweet or article page (with /status/ in the URL).
